name: Recruiter: Add a profile to a project (public /in/ or /talent/profile/) — robust
description: Adds ONE profile to a project as an active candidate. Daemon-only recruiter_add_profile strategy: navigates {{candidate_url}} (a public /in/<slug> bridges via 'View in Recruiter' to /talent/profile/), opens Save-to-project, switches to existing-project mode, types {{project_name}}, CLICKS the exact dropdown option (typing alone leaves Save disabled — the known gotcha), waits for Save to enable, saves, and VERIFIES via the project's active count ({{project_url}}). Params: candidate_url, project_name, project_url.

steps.intent: Add the profile to the project and verify
